pool.title: Long-Term Memory Layer for Agents
pool.verification_note: spec 刚生成。AsyncPostgresSaver 只存 thread-level state。无 semantic/episodic/procedural memory。ability_profile 是手工维度。pgvector 是否已启用需 plan 验证。
additional_constraints: 新自包含库 (Constitution I)：backend/app/modules/agent_memory/ 或 backend/app/agents/memory/
三层记忆：semantic (facts) / episodic (interactions) / procedural (patterns)
每个 graph 加 retrieve(user_id, query) 增强 prompt
pgvector 复用 (不引入新 vector store)；embedding model plan 决策
RLS 强制 per-user 隔离 (与现有 modules 一致)
LangMem/Mem0 是候选框架，plan 阶段评估
pool.verification_result: partial done: US1 semantic memory 代码完成 + 主 Agent 静态 review PASS (产品代码质量高: latest-wins + 并发竞态 + 幂等 + fail-open + RLS + PII redaction). commit ed44c0d feat(028). 47 unit test 全过 (extractor 15 + models 13 + repository 8 + retriever 11) + 10/11 integration 过 (1 fail 是测试代码 db_session vs get_session_context 事务隔离问题, 非产品 bug, ⏳ 后续修). 全量回归 548 passed / 0 failed 无回归 (baseline 469 + 028 新增 79). US2 episodic / US3 procedural / US4 user-control API / pgvector embedding / interview graph retriever 集成点 (planner_context.py 在用户 working tree 未提交) 全 ⏳ 后续. dev 429 中断在验证阶段 (132 tool_uses), 主 Agent resume 接手 review + commit, 跳过 reviewer subagent 避免 quota 风险.

pool.title: IRT-Based Adaptive Ability Diagnosis
pool.verification_note: spec 刚生成。现状 ability_diagnose aggregate_scores 是加权平均，无 IRT。无 item bank。重测信度未测。固定 5 题无自适应。
additional_constraints: 新自包含库 (Constitution I)：backend/app/modules/irt/ 或 backend/app/agents/irt/
2-PL (open-ended) / 3-PL (multiple-choice)；estimation method plan 决策 (marginal MLE / py-irt)
calibration batch 走 ARQ (不阻塞 agent)
保留 5 题 mock interview 模式，adaptive 是 opt-in
θ per-dimension；cross-dimension correlation out of scope
LLM 生成题的 difficulty 需标定 (不能信 LLM self-assessment)
pool.verification_result: partial done: US1 item bank + 2-PL + θ estimation 完成. commit 5273d7d feat(030). 42 unit tests pass (engine 2-PL math + θ estimation + repository + schemas). 全量 637 passed 无回归 (baseline 591 + 030 新增 46). backend/app/modules/irt/ 自包含库 (8 files: engine/models/repository/schemas/cli/seed + tests subdir). 2-PL probability_2pl 数值稳定 sigmoid. Newton-Raphson θ estimation 闭式 gradient+hessian. 10 sample items per dimension seed. migration 0020 RLS + CHECK constraints. 集成点 aggregate_scores.py 在 working tree 跟随 024 落地. US2 adaptive / US3 calibration batch / US4 adaptive mode / 3-PL / retest reliability ⏳. dev 完整跑完 153 tool_uses / 31 min / 142K tokens 无 429.

prompt 分层：system prompt → tool defs (alphabetical) → resume snapshot → requirements → 动态尾
